utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Each item is fully specified with coverage details and associated costs: (1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with costs and coverage details; (2) property_coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs; (3) travel_coverage specifies travel insurance with costs; (4) additional_services lists enhancement services and confirms inclusion and costs; (5) total_budget provides full monthly and annual breakdown with comparison and start date. Therefore, all 5 items are present and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: (1) health_coverage composed of 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (physical) and 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (mental), (2) property_coverage as 'EliteHome Premium Coverage', (3) travel_coverage as 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan', and (4) additional_services mentioning 'Concierge services'. By matching these names to the ground-truth ratings: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under physical health has a rating of 8, 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' under mental health has a rating of 6, 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' under home_content has a rating of 10, 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under travel_insurance has a rating of 10, and 'Concierge Services' under travel_enhancement_services has a rating of 7.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Physical and mental health insurance - €160/month (€100 LifeFirst Standard physical + €60 HealthFirst Standard mental) with €2M coverage limit, 5% deductible, pre-existing cardiovascular and respiratory conditions covered, global coverage suitable for France residents",
    "property_coverage": "EliteHome Premium Coverage - €95/month with luxury items protection up to high values, suitable for international residents",
    "travel_coverage": "PrimeTravel Premium Plan - €115/month with medical evacuation, 24/7 emergency support, business travel protection, global coverage",
    "additional_services": "Concierge services, 24/7 multilingual customer support, global assistance, emergency coordination, direct billing - included in comprehensive plan",
    "total_budget": "€370/month (€4,440 annually) - representing €615/month savings from previous €985/month spending, comprehensive family coverage for 4 members starting January 15, 2025, policy number issued and binding confirmation provided"
}
